intent: 1BR / 1 bath narrow LDK smoke test, no carport. 9x11 lot gives a 5x7 envelope = 35 m2 floor -- the LDK sibling of 1s_1br_nw_front_back_split_bath_gr, which stays compact-only (min is always the gr topology's job). Full-width living room at the front, dining + kitchen side-by-side behind it. This is the smaller (med) end of its 9x11-10x12 feasible range and runs tight -- bedroom and dining both sit close to their PD 1096 hard floors -- but solves COMPLIANT with no hard errors.
must_haves: full-width living room hosting the entry
separate dining and kitchen side-by-side behind living
